title: Fix getUsersByIds API in Flutter get-user-information snippet
description: The Flutter Dart block at line ~220 of get-user-information.mdx calls `userRepo.getUsersByIds(userIds)` but `getUsersByIds` does not exist in the Flutter SDK surface (UserRepository methods list is empty per flutter.json). The block also contains a Flutter StatefulWidget class definition mixed with standalone code. Two actions needed: (1) Find the correct Flutter API for fetching multiple users by IDs from flutter.json / SDK source and update the snippet, (2) The block is currently skip-marked (class-body-fragment) — after fixing the API, re-evaluate whether the widget class is still needed or if the snippet can be split into separate focused blocks that can be tested.
